pr.title: match and link itwstar.c and itnessyoyo.c
pr.author: lukechampine

summary: Matched and linked item translation units itwstar.c and itnessyoyo.c, with supporting item-code cleanup, symbol metadata updates, and configure.py promotion of both TUs from NonMatching to Matching. Bot report recorded +8152 matched-code bytes, +9056 linked-code bytes, 17 new matches, 8 unmatched-item improvements, and 1 small unmatched-item regression.

key_files.role: Promoted melee/it/items/itwstar.c and melee/it/items/itnessyoyo.c from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunks changing Object(NonMatching) to Object(Matching) for itwstar.c and itnessyoyo.c

key_files.role: Target matched item TU; bot report lists .data and it_80294364 as newly matched.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: itwstar.c added 17 deleted 5
text_corpus: bot report new matches for main/melee/it/items/itwstar .data and it_80294364

key_files.role: Target matched item TU; bot report lists .data, .rodata, .sdata2, it_802BFAFC, and it_802BF800 as newly matched.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: itnessyoyo.c added 38 deleted 34
text_corpus: bot report new matches for main/melee/it/items/itnessyoyo .data/.rodata/.sdata2 and functions

key_files.role: Adjusted data symbol metadata, including local/global scope, data type, sizes, and split labels around item data and literals.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt hunks for it_803B86A4, it_803F6F50, it_803F7080, it_804D52D0, it_804DCB40, it_804DD150 ranges

key_files.role: Cleaned matching-sensitive expressions and locals; bot report lists it_80271830, it_8027163C, and it_80270CD8 as newly matched.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itcoll.c hunks for it_80270CD8, it_8027163C, it_80271830
text_corpus: bot report new matches in main/melee/it/itcoll

key_files.role: Adjusted inline/helper shape, stack padding, and scheduling-sensitive branch behavior for improved matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itflipper.c adds itFlipper_GetAttrs and TODO no-op branch noting scheduling perturbation
text_corpus: bot report new match it_80290CE8 and improvements for flipper damage callbacks

key_files.role: Updated item logic table references from it_803F6F50.states to it_803F6F50 after symbol/type reshaping.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_279C.c replaces it_803F6F50.states with it_803F6F50 in two table entries

key_files.role: Large supporting item change; bot report lists .data improvement and one newly matched HitShield function.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: itseakneedlethrown.c added 52 deleted 56
text_corpus: bot report new match it_2725_Logic109_HitShield and improvements

key_files.role: Supporting header cleanup for Sheik needle thrown changes.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl: itseakneedlethrown.h added 2 deleted 12

what_changed.text: itwstar.c and itnessyoyo.c were linked as Matching objects in configure.py.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py NonMatching to Matching hunks

what_changed.text: PR adjusted GALE01 symbol metadata for item data, including changing some generated global names to local @ labels and splitting a large it_803F6F50 data object into a smaller global object plus multiple float arrays and a local string.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt hunks around .data 0x803F6F50 through 0x803F7080 and .sdata/.sdata2 local label conversions

what_changed.text: it_279C.c item logic table references were updated to use it_803F6F50 directly rather than it_803F6F50.states.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: it_279C.c two replacements

what_changed.text: itcoll.c replaced verbose/generated-looking branch ladders in it_80271830 with chained ternaries and removed some temporary locals in it_80270CD8.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itcoll.c it_80271830 and it_80270CD8 hunks

what_changed.text: itcoll.c introduced a local pointer to item->xB6C_vars[cnt] inside a loop, shortening repeated struct-field accesses while preserving the indexed loop.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itcoll.c it_8027163C hunk

what_changed.text: itflipper.c added an attribute accessor helper, changed an inline parameter order, used narrower PAD_STACK placement, and included a TODO-marked no-op branch because it perturbs scheduling.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itflipper.c hunks around itFlipper_GetAttrs and it_80290CE8

what_changed.text: Bot report recorded 17 new matches and 8 improvements, including new matches in itwstar, itnessyoyo, itlinkboomerang, itseakchain, itflipper, itcoll, itseakneedlethrown, and itmewtwoshadowball.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev[bot] report

what_changed.text: Bot report also recorded one unmatched-item regression for itLinkboomerang_UnkMotion3_Phys from 99.51% to 99.46%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev[bot] report regression table

smart_moves.text: Promoted only the two named target TUs in configure.py, aligning build configuration with the PR title and bot-reported 100% target-unit data matches.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: title
raw_diff: configure.py matching-object changes
text_corpus: bot report itwstar/itnessyoyo entries

smart_moves.text: Used symbol metadata changes rather than compensating source storage for item data/literal ownership, including local labels and corrected float/string data annotations.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt metadata changes

smart_moves.text: Simplified generated-looking min/max-style conditional code in it_80271830 into compact ternary assignments while achieving a bot-reported 100% match.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itcoll.c it_80271830 hunk
text_corpus: bot report it_80271830 98.62% to 100.00%

smart_moves.text: Left an explicit TODO on a scheduling-sensitive no-op branch in itflipper.c instead of silently normalizing it as ordinary style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itflipper.c TODO 'Eliminate this no-op branch (perturbs scheduling)'

decomp_lessons.lesson: For matching item data, symbol metadata can be part of the match: PR evidence shows global address-style item data and literals being narrowed to local @ labels, corrected data types, and split object ranges alongside code matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt local/global/type/size changes
text_corpus: bot report matched data +296 bytes and linked data +344 bytes

decomp_lessons.lesson: Generated-looking branch ladders for selecting bounds can sometimes be replaced by chained ternary assignments and still match, as shown by itcoll.c it_80271830 reaching 100%.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itcoll.c it_80271830 branch ladder to ternary changes
text_corpus: bot report it_80271830 new match

decomp_lessons.lesson: Introducing a local pointer for a repeated indexed struct slot can be a useful cleanup/matching shape when a loop repeatedly writes several fields of the same element.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itcoll.c it_8027163C introduces struct xB6C_t* vars
text_corpus: bot report it_8027163C new match

decomp_lessons.lesson: Scheduling-sensitive no-op branches should be marked as temporary matching tactics, not presented as normal cleanup.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itflipper.c TODO on no-op branch perturbing scheduling

naming_conventions.text: Local role names such as ip, vars, attrs, fighter, pos, vel, speed, and angle appear in changed code where roles are clear.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itcoll.c and itflipper.c hunks

naming_conventions.text: Address-style/global symbols were retained where semantics were not established, while many literal/float symbols were converted to compiler-style local @ labels in symbols.txt.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt conversions such as it_804DCB40 to @196 and it_804DD150 to @232

naming_conventions.text: Function names mostly remain address-style or existing item-action names; no evidence in the PR slice supports broad semantic renaming.
evidence_refs: changed_files.jsonl
text_corpus: bot report function names

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use configure.py Matching/NonMatching object classification only after the TU is ready to link as matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py promotes itwstar.c and itnessyoyo.c

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Adjust symbols.txt object sizes, scopes, labels, and data types to reflect section ownership and literal locality needed by item matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt hunks across .rodata, .data, .sdata, and .sdata2

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use expression reshaping and temporary-local removal to influence codegen, as in it_80270CD8 where intermediate locals were replaced with a single expression.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itcoll.c it_80270CD8 hunk
text_corpus: bot report it_80270CD8 new match

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use ternary select forms instead of expanded if/else branch ladders when matching min/max-like bounds updates.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itcoll.c it_80271830 hunk
text_corpus: bot report it_80271830 new match

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK and even a no-op branch were used narrowly in itflipper.c; the no-op branch was documented as scheduling-sensitive and a cleanup TODO.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itflipper.c PAD_STACK and TODO hunk

review_feedback.text: decomp-dev[bot] reported matched code 72.14% (+0.21%, +8152 bytes), linked code 47.17% (+0.23%, +9056 bytes), matched data 41.74% (+0.02%, +296 bytes), and linked data 35.41% (+0.03%, +344 bytes).
evidence_refs: text_corpus: issue_comment by decomp-dev[bot]

review_feedback.text: Bot report listed 17 new matches and 8 improvements, but also one regression in unmatched item itLinkboomerang_UnkMotion3_Phys from 99.51% to 99.46%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: issue_comment by decomp-dev[bot]

review_feedback.text: No human review comments or review records were present in the loaded PR slice.
evidence_refs: metadata_json: counts review_comments 0, reviews 0
text_corpus: only PR body and bot issue comment present

human_pr_text: PR body and progress note
raw_diff: truncated but includes key hunks for symbols.txt, configure.py, it_279C.c, itcoll.c, and itflipper.c

notes: The raw diff is truncated in loaded_files, so file-specific details for several changed item files are limited to changed-file metadata and bot report entries.
No human review comments were available; review_feedback is limited to the automated decomp report and explicit absence of human review records.
The bot report supports match/improvement/regression metrics but does not by itself prove author intent for every source-shape choice.
The PR title and configure.py changes strongly support the main claim that itwstar.c and itnessyoyo.c were linked as Matching.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Document scheduling-sensitive no-op branches as temporary tactics
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2653 includes a TODO-marked empty branch in itflipper.c explicitly saying it perturbs scheduling. This is good evidence for recording such shapes as narrow matching tactics requiring cleanup, not ordinary style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itflipper.c TODO no-op branch

accepted_candidate_records.title: Ternary select forms can recover branch-ladder matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2653 replaced expanded if/else selection code in itcoll.c it_80271830 with chained ternary assignments and the bot report showed the function reaching 100%.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itcoll.c it_80271830 hunk
text_corpus: bot report it_80271830 new match

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use symbols.txt metadata for real data ownership instead of source workarounds
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2653 changed item data symbol scopes, labels, object sizes, and data types in symbols.txt while improving matched/linked data metrics.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt hunks
text_corpus: bot report data metric improvements

source_update_candidates.title: Temporary no-op branches should require explicit matching evidence and cleanup notes
source_update_candidates.text: When an empty/no-op conditional is used only to perturb scheduling, require a narrow comment/TODO and verifier evidence, and treat it as cleanup debt rather than normal source style.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: itflipper.c TODO 'Eliminate this no-op branch (perturbs scheduling)'
source_update_candidates.reason: Existing standards cover matching tactics needing evidence, but this PR provides a concrete example of an empty branch documented as scheduling-sensitive.

source_update_candidates.title: configure.py controls Matching/NonMatching status for item TUs
source_update_candidates.text: In PR 2653, configure.py entries under MatchingFor promoted melee/it/items/itwstar.c and melee/it/items/itnessyoyo.c from Object(NonMatching, ...) to Object(Matching, ...).
evidence_refs: raw_diff: configure.py hunks
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path fact for future intake/search; route to curator instead of promoting directly.

source_update_candidates.title: config/GALE01/symbols.txt carries item data symbol scope/type metadata
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2653 used config/GALE01/symbols.txt to change item-related .rodata, .data, .sdata, and .sdata2 symbol scope, type, size, align, and local labels.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: symbols.txt hunks
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a source/path fact candidate supported by diff evidence.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that all data-symbol-to-local-label changes are always preferred; this PR only supports such changes where symbol metadata and matching context justify them.
Do not mark the flipper no-op branch as accepted style; the source itself labels it a TODO to eliminate.
Do not infer human reviewer approval rationale because no human review comments were present.
Do not claim a clean regression-free PR: the bot report listed one unmatched-item regression.
